summary.para: Utility class to access information about the multiplayer play mode player while in playmode.
Indicates if the currently running player is the main editor.
Returns the tag(s) assigned to the currently running player.

returns.para: Returns the array of assigned tags

summary.para: Returns the tag(s) assigned to the currently running player. This property is read-only and should be used to access the tags without modifying them.

returns.para: Returns the array of assigned tags
